title: echinacea angustifolia var. tennesseensis
intro: Echinacea angustifolia var. tennesseensis, also known as Tennessee coneflower, is a variety of the coneflower plant that is native to the United States, specifically in the southeastern regions, including Tennessee and surrounding areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Echinacea angustifolia var. tennesseensis include boosting the immune system, reducing the severity and duration of colds and flu, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
